title: BC FLA Property Division and Debt Allocation
description: Sub-schema for property division and debt allocation in a British Columbia Family Law Act separation agreement. Statutory references marked [VERIFY] should be confirmed against the current Family Law Act, SBC 2011, c. 25.

Asset.description: A family property asset record per FLA s. 84 [VERIFY].

asset_id.description: Unique identifier for this asset within the agreement.

description.description: Plain-language description of the asset sufficient for identification.

legal_title_holder.description: Party holding legal title or registered ownership.

acquisition_value.description: Value of the asset at the time of acquisition, in CAD.

valuation_method.description: Method used to determine current value.

current_value.description: Fair market value of the asset as at the valuation date, in CAD.

valuation_source.description: Source or authority for the current value (e.g., 'BC Assessment 2026', 'Appraisal by J. Smith dated 2026-03-15').

items.description: Reference to a debt_id secured against this asset.

encumbrances.description: Array of debt_id references for debts secured against this asset.

equalization_payment.description: Net equalization amount attributable to this asset. Positive = payable by spouse_1 to spouse_2; negative = reverse.

Debt.description: A family debt record per FLA s. 86 [VERIFY].

debt_id.description: Unique identifier for this debt within the agreement.

creditor.description: Name of the creditor or financial institution.

original_amount.description: Original principal amount of the debt, in CAD.

current_balance.description: Outstanding balance as at the valuation date, in CAD.

interest_rate.description: Annual interest rate expressed as a percentage (e.g., 5.25).

monthly_payment.description: Current required monthly payment, in CAD.

secured_against.description: Reference to the asset_id this debt is secured against, or null if unsecured.

legal_obligor.description: Party legally responsible for the debt per the creditor agreement.

indemnity_required.description: Whether the non-allocated spouse is entitled to an indemnity from the allocated spouse for this debt.

Valuation.description: Details supporting the valuation of a particular asset or interest.

valuation_date.description: Date as of which the valuation was prepared.

valuator_name.description: Name and credentials of the valuator.

valuation_method.description: Methodology applied (income approach, asset approach, market approach, actuarial, etc.).

fair_market_value.description: Concluded fair market value in CAD.

report_reference.description: File name or reference to the attached valuation report.

Allocation.description: Specifies how an asset or debt is allocated between the spouses.

allocated_to.description: Party receiving the asset or assuming the debt, or disposition method.

split_ratio.description: Ratio of division if sold_proceeds_split or retained_jointly (e.g., '50:50', '60:40'). Spouse_1 share listed first.

RealProperty.description: Extended record for real estate assets, supplementing the base Asset definition.

pid.description: Parcel Identifier (PID) registered at the BC Land Title Office.

civic_address.description: Municipal street address of the property.

legal_description.description: Full legal description as shown on the certificate of title.

mortgage_details.description: Details of the mortgage registered against this property.

refinance_plan.description: Terms for refinancing if one spouse is retaining the property.

deadline.description: Date by which refinancing must be completed.

release_of_non_retaining_spouse.description: Whether the non-retaining spouse must be released from the mortgage covenant.

sale_plan.description: Terms if the property is to be listed and sold.

listing_deadline.description: Date by which the property must be listed.

target_list_price.description: Agreed list price in CAD, or null if to be set by agent.

listing_agent.description: Agreed real estate agent or brokerage.

price_reduction_schedule.description: Terms for price reductions if unsold (e.g., '5% reduction every 60 days').

exclusive_possession.description: Details of any exclusive possession arrangement or order.

court_order_reference.description: Court file number if possession is court-ordered.

lto_transfer_instructions.description: Instructions for Land Title Office transfer.

transfer_form.description: LTO form to be used (typically Form A Transfer).

ptt_exemption_claimed.description: Whether Property Transfer Tax exemption under s. 14(4)(a) PTA [VERIFY] is claimed for transfers between separating spouses.

registration_deadline.description: Date by which the transfer must be submitted for registration.

plan_name.description: Name of the pension plan or RRSP/RRIF institution.

plan_type.description: Type of retirement savings or pension vehicle.

plan_administrator.description: Name and contact for the plan administrator.

member_spouse.description: The spouse who is the plan member.

benefit_accrual_period.description: Period used to calculate the proportionate share.

relationship_start.description: Date relationship began for pension division purposes.

relationship_end.description: Date relationship ended for pension division purposes.

division_method.description: Method of division. Division at source per BC PBSA Part 6 [VERIFY] for provincially regulated plans.

bc_pbsa_forms.description: Applicable BC Pension Benefits Standards Act forms for division at source.

form_p1_notice.description: Whether Form P1 (Notice to Plan Administrator) is required [VERIFY].

form_p2_agreement.description: Whether Form P2 (Spouse's Agreement) is required [VERIFY].

federal_pbda_division.description: For federally regulated pensions: division under the Pension Benefits Division Act, SC 1992, c. 46, Sch. II [VERIFY].

application_form.description: Federal form required for division application.

actuarial_valuation.description: Actuarial valuation for defined benefit plans.

rrsp_rollover.description: RRSP transfer on relationship breakdown under ITA s. 146(16) [VERIFY].

transfer_amount.description: Amount to be transferred in CAD.

form_t2220_required.description: Whether CRA Form T2220 (Transfer from an RRSP) must be filed [VERIFY].

receiving_plan.description: Name and account of the receiving RRSP or RRIF.

current_value.description: Commuted or account value in CAD as at valuation date.

allocated_share_non_member.description: Value or percentage allocated to the non-member spouse.

BusinessInterest.description: Corporate shares, partnership interests, or sole proprietorship interests.

entity_name.description: Legal name of the business entity.

jurisdiction_of_incorporation.description: Jurisdiction where the entity is incorporated or registered.

share_class.description: Class and series of shares held, if applicable.

disposition.description: How the business interest will be dealt with.

security_for_payment.description: Collateral or guarantee securing the buyout obligation.

non_compete.description: Non-competition restrictions if the exiting spouse must refrain from competing.

duration_months.description: Duration of the non-compete in months.

non_solicitation.description: Non-solicitation restrictions on the exiting spouse.

Account.description: Financial account record (bank, brokerage, TFSA, non-registered investment, crypto wallet, etc.).

account_id.description: Unique identifier for this account within the agreement.

institution.description: Name of financial institution or platform.

account_number_last_four.description: Last four digits of the account number for identification.

balance_at_valuation_date.description: Account balance as at the valuation date, in CAD.

valuation_date.description: Valuation date for family property per FLA s. 87 [VERIFY]. Default is the date of the agreement unless the parties agree otherwise.

is_default.description: True if the valuation date is the date of the agreement (FLA s. 87 default) [VERIFY].

override_reason.description: If is_default is false, the reason the parties selected an alternative valuation date (e.g., 'date of separation', 'date of trial').

family_property.description: All family property within the meaning of FLA s. 84 [VERIFY]. Includes property owned by at least one spouse at the date of separation, regardless of when acquired, unless excluded under s. 85.

excluded_property.description: Property excluded from family property under FLA s. 85 [VERIFY]. Growth in value during the relationship is family property per FLA s. 84(2)(g) [VERIFY].

exclusion_basis.description: Statutory basis for exclusion under FLA s. 85(1) [VERIFY].

tracing_documentation.description: References to supporting documents establishing the tracing chain (e.g., 'Exhibit A: 2010 bank statement showing inheritance deposit').

value_at_relationship_start.description: Value of the excluded property at the start of the relationship, in CAD.

growth_in_value_during_relationship.description: Increase in value during the relationship. This amount is family property and divisible under FLA s. 84(2)(g) [VERIFY].

family_debt.description: All family debt within the meaning of FLA s. 86 [VERIFY]. Includes debt incurred during the relationship for a family purpose and debt incurred to acquire, maintain, or improve family property.

real_property.description: Detailed records for each parcel of real property, supplementing the corresponding family_property entry.

pensions_and_rrsps.description: Pension plans, RRSPs, RRIFs, LIRAs, LIFs, and DPSPs subject to division.

business_interests.description: Corporate shares, partnership interests, and sole proprietorship interests that are family property.

personal_property.description: Tangible personal property (furniture, jewelry, art, collectibles, etc.).

vehicles.description: Motor vehicles, recreational vehicles, boats, and similar titled personal property.

year_make_model.description: Year, make, and model of the vehicle.

registration_holder.description: Party in whose name the vehicle is registered.

financial_accounts.description: Bank accounts, brokerage accounts, TFSAs, non-registered investments, and crypto wallets.

equalization_payment_summary.description: Summary calculation of the equalization payment.

total_family_property_fmv.description: Aggregate fair market value of all family property in CAD.

total_family_debt.description: Aggregate outstanding family debt in CAD.

net_family_property.description: Total family property FMV minus total family debt.

division_ratio.description: Division ratio. Default is 50:50 per FLA s. 81 [VERIFY]. Spouse_1 share listed first.

unequal_division.description: Applicable only if the parties agree to an unequal division. Courts may order unequal division under FLA s. 95 [VERIFY] where equal division would be significantly unfair.

fla_s95_factors.description: Significant unfairness factors relied upon (e.g., 'duration of relationship', 'spouse's contribution to the other's career', 'debt incurred for non-family purposes').

agreed_ratio.description: Agreed unequal ratio. Spouse_1 share first.

spouse_1_net_entitlement.description: Spouse_1's calculated share of net family property in CAD.

spouse_2_net_entitlement.description: Spouse_2's calculated share of net family property in CAD.

net_equalization_payment.description: The net payment required to achieve the agreed division.

payment_terms.description: Terms governing payment of the equalization amount.

lump_sum_due_date.description: Due date for lump sum payment, if applicable.

interest_rate.description: Annual interest rate on outstanding balance, if any.

security.description: Security or collateral for deferred payment (e.g., charge on real property, letter of credit).

tax_treatment.description: Tax considerations and elections governing property transfers between the spouses.

spousal_rollover_ita_s73.description: Automatic rollover at adjusted cost base under ITA s. 73 [VERIFY] for transfers between spouses.

applies.description: Whether the s. 73 rollover applies to transfers under this agreement.

election_to_opt_out.description: Whether the parties elect to transfer at FMV instead (triggering capital gains).

capital_gains_exposure.description: Assets where a capital gain or loss may be realized on transfer or sale.

adjusted_cost_base.description: ACB of the asset in CAD.

estimated_gain_or_loss.description: Estimated capital gain (positive) or loss (negative) in CAD.

principal_residence_designation.description: Agreement on principal residence designation under ITA s. 54 [VERIFY].

asset_id.description: Reference to the real_property asset_id designated as principal residence.

designated_years.description: Tax years for which the property is designated as principal residence.

attribution_rules_acknowledgment.description: Acknowledgment that ITA s. 74.5(3) [VERIFY] provides an exception to attribution rules for transfers pursuant to a separation agreement or court order.

independent_tax_advice.description: Whether each party confirms having received independent tax advice.

implementation_and_transfer.description: Mechanics for executing the property division and completing all required transfers.

implementation_deadline_days.description: Number of days after execution of the agreement within which all transfers and steps must be completed.

asset_id.description: Reference to the asset being transferred.

transfer_method.description: Method of transfer (e.g., 'Form A LTO transfer', 'ICBC transfer', 'broker DTC transfer').

document_execution_authority.description: Power of attorney or deemed signing provisions if a party fails to execute required documents.

irrevocable_poa_granted.description: Whether each party grants the other an irrevocable power of attorney to execute transfer documents if they fail to do so.

deemed_signing_clause.description: Whether the agreement itself operates as authority for registration in the event of non-compliance.

escrow.description: Escrow arrangements for funds or documents pending completion.

escrow_agent.description: Name of the escrow agent (typically one party's solicitor).

items_in_escrow.description: List of documents or funds held in escrow.

release_conditions.description: Conditions that must be satisfied for release of escrowed items.

default_and_breach.description: Remedies available if a party fails to comply with the implementation obligations.

notice_period_days.description: Number of days' written notice required before a default is triggered.

remedies.description: Available remedies (e.g., 'specific performance', 'costs on a full indemnity basis', 'interest at the post-judgment rate under the Court Order Interest Act [VERIFY]', 'registration of the agreement as a court order under FLA s. 44 [VERIFY]').

interest_on_late_payment.description: Interest accruing on late equalization or other payments.

rate.description: Annual interest rate as a percentage.

basis.description: Statutory or contractual basis for the rate (e.g., 'Court Order Interest Act, RSBC 1996, c. 79 [VERIFY]').
